q1.hi-IN: Sabse pehle, aap kahan rehte hain? Kaunsa state ya sheher?
q1.ta-IN: Mudhalil, neengal engae vasikireerkal? Enna maanilam allathu nagaram?
q1.bn-IN: Prothome, apni kothai thaken? Kon state ba shohor?
q1.te-IN: Modaluga, meeru ekkada untunnaru? Ee raashtramo leda nagaram?
q1.gu-IN: Saupratham, tame kyaan rehvo chho? Kyu rajya ke shaher?
q1.kn-IN: Modalige, neevu ellidderi? Yaava raajya athava nagara?
q1.ml-IN: Aadyamaayi, ningal evide aanu taamasikkunnathu? Ethu samsthaanam allenkil nagaram?
q1.mr-IN: Aadhi saanga, tumhi kuthe raahta? Konata state kiva shahar?
q1.pa-IN: Pehlan, tusi kithe rehde ho? Kihda state ya sheher?
q1.od-IN: Prathame, apane kouthi rahantu? Keun rajya ba sahara?
q1.en-IN: First of all, where do you live? Which state or city?

q1_fallback.hi-IN: Village ka naam samajh aaya. Kaunsa district ya state hai?
q1_fallback.ta-IN: Gramam purindhadhu. Enna mavattam allathu maanilam?
q1_fallback.bn-IN: Gram er naam bujhechi. Kon jela ba state?
q1_fallback.te-IN: Graamam arthamaindi. Ee jillaa leda raashtramo?
q1_fallback.gu-IN: Gaam nu naam samjaayu. Kyo jillo ke rajya?
q1_fallback.kn-IN: Graama hagu arthaayitu. Yaava jille athava raajya?
q1_fallback.ml-IN: Graamam manassilayi. Ethu jilla allenkil samsthaanam?
q1_fallback.mr-IN: Gaav che naav samajla. Konata jilha kiva state?
q1_fallback.pa-IN: Pind da naam samajh aaya. Kihda zila ya state?
q1_fallback.od-IN: Gaanra naama bujhigali. Keun jillaa ba rajya?
q1_fallback.en-IN: Got the village name. Which district or state is that?

q2.hi-IN: Aapke ghar mein kitne log hain? Aap, bachche, bade — sab milakar?
q2.ta-IN: Ungal veetil ethanai per irukkiraargal? Neengal, kuzhanthaigal, periyavargal — ellarum serthu?
q2.bn-IN: Apnar barite kotojon achen? Apni, bacchara, boro ra — sob miliye?
q2.te-IN: Mee intlo entha mandi unnaru? Meeru, pillalu, peddavaallu — andaru kalipite?
q2.gu-IN: Tamaara ghar maa ketlaa lok chhe? Tame, baalako, mota — badha maline?
q2.kn-IN: Nimma maneyalli eshthu janaru iddare? Neevu, makkalu, hiriyaru — ellaroo seri?
q2.ml-IN: Ningalude veettil ethraperu undu? Ningal, kuttikall, muthirnnavir — ellaavarumkoodi?
q2.mr-IN: Tumchya gharat kiti lok aahet? Tumhi, mula, mothe — sagla milun?
q2.pa-IN: Tuhaade ghar vich kitne lok hain? Tusi, bachche, wadde — sab mile ke?
q2.od-IN: Apana ghare ketejana achhanti? Apane, pilaa, bada — sab milaaile?
q2.en-IN: How many people in your household? You, children, elders — everyone?

q2_fallback.hi-IN: Aap, patni/pati, bachche — kitne sab milakar?
q2_fallback.te-IN: Meeru, bhaarya/bharta, pillalu — mottam entha mandi?
q2_fallback.od-IN: Apane, stri/swami, pilaa — sabu milaaile kete?
q2_fallback.en-IN: You, spouse, children — how many total?

q3.hi-IN: Aapke ghar ka kharcha kaise chalta hai? Naukri, daily mazdoori, ya apna kaam? Yeh sirf yojana dhundne ke liye hai. Kisi aur ko nahi bataya jaayega.
q3.ta-IN: Ungal veettu selavu eppadi nadakkiRadhu? Velai, dhina kooli, allathu sondha thozhil? Idhu thittangalai kaNdupidikka mattum. Veeru yaaridalum sollappadaadhu.
q3.bn-IN: Apnar barir khoroch ki kore chole? Chakri, doinik mazdoori, na nijer kaaj? Eta shudhu yojana khunje ber korar jonno. Aar kaauke bolaa hobe na.
q3.te-IN: Mee intlo kharchu ela nadusthundi? Udhyogam, roju kooli, leda svanthamu? Idi paddhathulanu kanugonnataniki maathrame. Evariki cheppamu.
q3.gu-IN: Tamaara ghar no kharcho kem chale chhe? Naukri, dihadi majdoori, ke potaano dhandho? Aa faqat yojana shodh-va mate chhe. Koi ne kahevaama nahi aave.
q3.kn-IN: Nimma maneyalli kharchu hege nadeyuttade? Kelasa, dinada kooli, athava svantha udyoga? Idu yojane hudukalu maathra. Yaravarigoo heluvudilla.
q3.ml-IN: Ningalude veettile chelavu engane nadakkunnu? Joli, dhinakkooli, allenkil svanthamu? Ithu padhathikal kandetthaan maathram. Aarum ariyilla.
q3.mr-IN: Tumchya gharcha kharcha kasa chaalto? Naukri, dihadi majdoori, ki swatachya dhandha? He phakt yojana shodh-nyasaathi aahe. Konalahi sangitala jaanaar nahi.
q3.pa-IN: Tuhaade ghar da kharcha ki tarah chald hai? Naukri, dihadi majdoori, ya aapna kamm? Eh sirf yojana labhan layi hai. Kisi hor nu nahi dassya jaavega.
q3.od-IN: Apana gharara kharcha kemiti chale? Chakiri, dainika majdoori, ba nijara kaama? Eha keval yojana khojibare. Aau kaahaku kahuaa jaibanahin.
q3.en-IN: How does your household manage expenses? Job, daily wage, or own business? This is only for finding schemes. It won't be shared with anyone.

q4.hi-IN: Kya aapke ghar mein kisi ke paas health insurance hai? Company ka ho, ya koi sarkari card?
q4.ta-IN: Ungal veetil yaaridalaavathu sugadhara kaappeettu irukkiradhaa? Company-yudaiyatho, allathu arasaanga card-o?
q4.bn-IN: Apnar barite karo ki health insurance ache? Company-r hok, ba kono sorkari card?
q4.te-IN: Mee intlo evariki aina health insurance undaa? Company di, leda emi sarkaari card?
q4.gu-IN: Tamaara ghar maa koi ni paase health insurance chhe? Company nu hoy, ke sarkaari card?
q4.kn-IN: Nimma maneyalli yaarige aadaru health insurance ide? Company du, athava sarkaari card?
q4.ml-IN: Ningalude veettil aarkkenkkilum health insurance undo? Company yude, allenkil sarkaar card?
q4.mr-IN: Tumchya gharat konala health insurance aahe kaa? Company cha, ki sarkaari card?
q4.pa-IN: Tuhaade ghar vich kisi kol health insurance hai? Company da hove, ya koi sarkaari card?
q4.od-IN: Apana ghare kaahara paakhe health insurance achhi ki? Company ra, ba kichhi sarkaari card?
q4.en-IN: Does anyone in your household have health insurance? From company, or any government card?

q4_fallback.hi-IN: Kya company salary se koi paisa kaat-ti hai health ke liye?
q4_fallback.ta-IN: Company sambalam-irundhu sugadhara-kkaaga edhaavadhu piditham seyyappadugiRadhaa?
q4_fallback.bn-IN: Company beton theke ki kichu taaka katche health er jonyo?
q4_fallback.te-IN: Company jeetam nundi health kosam emi teestaaru?
q4_fallback.gu-IN: Company pagar maathi health mate koi paisa kaape chhe?
q4_fallback.kn-IN: Company sambala-dinda health ge enu haNa kaDi-taare?
q4_fallback.ml-IN: Company shambalam-il ninnu health inu ethenkilum pidikkunno?
q4_fallback.mr-IN: Company pagar madhun health saathi kaahi paisa kapte kaa?
q4_fallback.pa-IN: Company tankhah vicho health layi koi paisa katdi hai?
q4_fallback.od-IN: Company betana ru health paayin kichhi paisa kaatibare?
q4_fallback.en-IN: Does your company deduct anything from salary for health?

q5.hi-IN: Kya koi khaas ilaaj ya bimari ke liye madad chahiye? Ya bas jaanna chahte hain ki kya milta hai?
q5.ta-IN: Edhaavathu kurippitta sikichai allathu noikku uthavi veNumaa? Allathu enna kidaikkum endru therindhu kolla virumbugireeRkalaa?
q5.bn-IN: Kono bishesh chikitsa ba roger jonno sahajjo chai? Na shudhu jaante chan ki ki paoa jaay?
q5.te-IN: Emainaa prath-yeka chikilsa leda rogaaniki sahayam kaavaalaa? Leda emi dorukuthundo telusukuntaaraa?
q5.gu-IN: Koi khaas saarvar ke bimari mate madad joie chhe? Ke faqat jaanvu chhe shu male chhe?
q5.kn-IN: Yaavude visheshha chikitsa athava rogakke sahaya beku? Athava enu siguttade endu tiliyabeku?
q5.ml-IN: Ethenkilum pratiyeka chikitsa allenkil rogathinu sahaayam veNamo? Allenkil entha kittum enn ariyaanam?
q5.mr-IN: Kahi vishesh upchaar ki aajaara saathi madad pahije? Ki phaKt jaanun ghyaycha ki kay milta?
q5.pa-IN: Koi khaas ilaaj ya bimari layi madad chahidi hai? Ya bas jaanna chahde ho ki ki milda hai?
q5.od-IN: Kichhi bisesha chikitsaa ba roga paayin sahajya chaahanti ki? Ba khaali jaanibaku chahanti ki ki mile?
q5.en-IN: Need help for specific treatment? Or just want to know what's available?

correction.hi-IN: Kaunsi baat galat hai? Jagah, ghar ke log, kaam, insurance, ya health?
correction.ta-IN: Endha thagaval thavaru? Idam, kudumbam, velai, kaappeettu, allathu sugaadharam?
correction.bn-IN: Kon tothyo bhul? Jayga, poribar, kaaj, insurance, na swasthyo?
correction.te-IN: Ee samacharam thappu? Chota, kudumbam, pani, insurance, leda aarogyam?
correction.gu-IN: Kai vaatu kharabi chhe? Jagya, parivar, kaam, insurance, ke aarogya?
correction.kn-IN: Yaava mahiti thappu? Jaaga, kutumba, kelasa, insurance, athava aarogya?
correction.ml-IN: Ethu vivaaram thettaanu? Sthlam, kudumbam, joli, insurance, allenkil aarogyam?
correction.mr-IN: Konati mahiti chukichi aahe? Jagaa, kutumb, kaam, insurance, ki aarogya?
correction.pa-IN: Kihdi gall galat hai? Jagah, ghar de lok, kamm, insurance, ya sehat?
correction.od-IN: Keun katha bhul? Jaaga, paribaara, kaama, insurance, ba swasthya?
correction.en-IN: Which part is wrong? Location, family, work, insurance, or health?

confirm_family.en-IN: there are {count} people in your household
